ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was released */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "popularity_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the popularity was updated */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the song has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the song has received */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the song has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "active_since" TEXT /* Date when the artist started their career */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_artists" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being featured */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follow relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follow relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)
